inventory_reorderpoint_20260703_000001.sme_justification: Parts at or below reorder point — replenishment trigger report against the part table reorder_point threshold; primary MRP replenishment planning query

inventory_onhandquantity_20260703_000002.sme_justification: On-hand stock levels by part class with inventory value and reorder-point flag counts — primary stock-status query against the part table

inventory_leadtime_20260703_000003.sme_justification: Lead time summary by part class (avg/min/max days, long-lead count) — MRP planning-horizon decision support query against the part table

inventory_atp_20260703_000004.sme_justification: Available-to-promise quantity per part: on-hand stock minus total open customer-order commitments. Dataset derivation — no single column owns ATP; the approved snippet is the definition.

unresolved_joins.detail: NOT col.need_by_date IS NULL AND DATE(col.need_by_date) >= b.b_start AND DATE(col.need_by_date) < b.b_end
NOT po.required_date IS NULL AND DATE(po.required_date) >= b.b_start AND DATE(po.required_date) < b.b_end
NOT wo.required_date IS NULL AND DATE(wo.required_date) >= b.b_start AND DATE(wo.required_date) < b.b_end

inventory_allocated_20260703_000005.sme_justification: Allocated quantity per part: sum of open customer-order-line quantities committed against on-hand stock. Dataset derivation over customer_order_line — the approved snippet is the definition.

operations_oeeoperational_20260604_00000.sme_justification: OEE operational proxy: actual vs. scheduled run hours per active shop resource, grouped by resource for shift-level line efficiency and throughput reporting

operations_oeestrategic_20260604_000008.sme_justification: OEE strategic proxy: cost efficiency and utilization aggregated by resource type for capital investment, capacity planning, and equipment replacement decisions

operations_equipmentstatemaintenance_202.sme_justification: Maintenance scheduling view: open-operation count, remaining run hours, and last close date per active shop resource — identifies resources due for PM or blocked by open operations

operations_equipmentstatecompliance_2026.sme_justification: Compliance view: cert-required receipts with inspection and certificate status joined to shop resources — verifies cert-required material processed on each resource has a current certificate

operations_equipmentstateproduction_2026.sme_justification: Production scheduling view: active shop resources with their current open work order operations, scheduled windows, and estimated cost — used by supervisors for machine loading and scheduling decisions

sales_ordercustomerstate_20260604_000012.sme_justification: Customer-facing work order delivery status: classifies each order as On Time, Late, Overdue, At Risk, or On Schedule against required delivery dates

operations_deliveryperformanceops_202606.sme_justification: Operations delivery performance: inbound on-time receipt rate per PO compared to required date — flags overdue open POs for expediting and tracks material delivery reliability

inventory_safetystock_20260703_000006.sme_justification: Safety stock proxy: reorder point minus estimated lead-time demand (avg daily demand from customer_order_line × lead_time_days). Column anchor: part.reorder_point encodes the safety buffer in this ERP (ROP = SS + LT demand). Dataset derivation — approved snippet is the authoritative definition.

inventory_leadtimedemand_20260703_000007.sme_justification: Lead-time demand: average daily demand (customer_order_line) × part.lead_time_days. Column anchor: part.lead_time_days is the planning window factor. Dataset derivation — approved snippet is the authoritative definition.

inventory_minimumstock_20260703_000008.sme_justification: Minimum stock quantity: part.reorder_point is the min level in a min/max replenishment policy. Direct column read with below/at/above status classification.

inventory_maximumstock_20260703_000009.sme_justification: Maximum stock quantity: reorder_point + average historical PO replenishment qty (po_line.quantity aggregated per part). Column anchor: po_line.quantity captures the observed replenishment lot size. Dataset derivation — approved snippet is the authoritative definition.

inventory_eoq_20260703_000010.sme_justification: EOQ proxy: average observed PO order quantity (po_line.quantity) reflects the historically settled replenishment lot size. Without D/S/H cost parameters in this schema the empirical PO quantity is the closest available proxy. Column anchor: po_line.quantity. Falls back to reorder_point when no PO history exists.

payables_ordersreceived_20260706_000001.sme_justification: Purchase orders fully received — every po_line has receipt coverage >= ordered quantity, computed line-by-line via receiving_line.po_line_id; core receiving-completion procurement view

payables_ordersunreceived_20260706_00000.sme_justification: Purchase orders unreceived or short — at least one po_line not fully received, with unreceived vs short line counts and outstanding quantity; core expediting / open-order procurement view
